# MuPDF.NET

> MuPDF.NET is a high-performance C# library for data extraction, analysis, conversion & manipulation of PDF (and other) documents. It is the official .NET binding for MuPDF from Artifex Software, derived from PyMuPDF and closely following its structure.

MuPDF.NET is available under the Artifex Community License and commercial license agreements.

- NuGet: https://www.nuget.org/packages/MuPDF.NET/
- GitHub: https://github.com/ArtifexSoftware/MuPDF.NET
- Discord: https://artifex.com/discord/artifex
- Forum: https://forum.mupdf.com

## Documentation

### Getting Started

- [Getting Started](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/getting-started/index.html): Prerequisites, installation via NuGet, building from source, Adobe PDF References, license info

### The Basics

- [The Basics](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/the-basics/index.html): Practical how-to guide covering:
  - Supported File Types
  - Opening a File
  - Extract text from a PDF
  - Extract images from a PDF
  - Extract vector graphics
  - Merging PDF files
  - Adding a watermark to a PDF
  - Adding text to a PDF
  - Adding an image to a PDF
  - Converting a PDF page to an image
  - Converting from an image to a PDF
  - Extracting & Drawing vector graphics
  - Rotating a PDF
  - Cropping a PDF
  - Attaching Files / Embedding Files
  - Deleting, Re-Arranging, Copying, Selecting Pages
  - Adding Blank Pages
  - Inserting Pages with Text Content
  - Splitting / Combining Single Pages
  - PDF Encryption & Decryption
  - Getting Page Links
  - Getting All Annotations from a Document
  - Redacting content from a PDF
  - Working with Barcodes (Reading & Writing)
  - Using Image Filters

### API Reference — Classes

- [Classes index](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/index.html)
- [Annot](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/Annot.html): PDF annotations — create, modify, delete, set colours/icons/quads/contents
- [Archive](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/Archive.html): Archive (zip/tar) access
- [Barcode](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/Barcode.html): Barcode creation and reading; BarcodeFormat enum
- [ColorSpace](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/ColorSpace.html): Colour space objects (RGB, GRAY, CMYK)
- [DisplayList](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/DisplayList.html): Pre-rendered page display list for efficient re-use
- [Document](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/Document.html): Core class — open, save, encrypt, manipulate pages, TOC, metadata, embedded files, optional content, journalling
- [DocumentWriter](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/DocumentWriter.html): Write pages to new documents (PDF, SVG, etc.)
- [Font](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/Font.html): Font objects for TextWriter; glyph info, font bbox
- [IdentityMatrix](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/IdentityMatrix.html): The identity transformation matrix
- [ImageFilter](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/ImageFilter.html): Apply filters to images
- [ImageFilterPipeline](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/ImageFilterPipeline.html): Chain multiple image filters
- [IRect](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/IRect.html): Integer rectangle
- [Link](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/Link.html): Page link objects (internal/external)
- [Matrix](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/Matrix.html): Transformation matrix for rotation, scaling, translation
- [Outline](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/Outline.html): Table of contents / bookmark tree node
- [Page](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/Page.html): Page class — render, extract text, annotations, links, widgets, drawing
- [Pixmap](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/Pixmap.html): Raster image data; supported input/output image formats
- [Point](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/Point.html): 2D point (x, y)
- [Quad](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/Quad.html): Quadrilateral (4 Points) for text highlighting
- [Rect](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/Rect.html): Rectangle defined by (x0, y0, x1, y1)
- [Shape](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/Shape.html): PDF-only — interconnected graphical elements on a page
- [Story](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/Story.html): HTML/CSS-based content layout engine; element positioning callback
- [TextPage](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/TextPage.html): Internal text extraction structure; structured output formats
- [TextWriter](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/TextWriter.html): Write text to a PDF page with a Font object
- [Widget](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/Widget.html): PDF form fields; standard fonts; supported widget types
- [Xml](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/classes/Xml.html): DOM helper for Story objects; text properties; context manager support

### API Reference — Other

- [Utils](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/glossary/Utils.html): Miscellaneous utility functions — PaperSize, PaperRect, colour conversion, glyph utilities, GetTables, ReadBarcodes, WriteBarcode, and more
- [Constants and Enumerations](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/glossary/vars.html): ColorSpace constants, Document Permissions, PDF Optional Content codes, encryption methods, font file extensions, inbuilt fonts, text alignment, text extraction flags, link destination kinds/flags, annotation constants, widget constants, blend modes, stamp annotation icons

### Migration

- [Migrating from ByteScout SDK](https://mupdfnet.readthedocs.io/en/latest/migration/bytescout/index.html): Side-by-side equivalents for setup, loading documents, extracting text, converting pages to images
